title: Create: Bedtime
description: Create-focused modpack for the SSB server
body:
This modpack is mainly focused on Create and its addons alongside exploration-enhancing mods that add new biomes and structures. I created this with the intent to use it on a long-term world I could return to in the future so there are no particular goals or objectives the pack will steer you towards; it is simply a collection of mods I find fit for that purpose. I have done some general testing, but I haven't tested everything 100% so it's possible some issues arise. Feel free to contact me on Discord @nyarumiyukimitsu if something goes wrong (or if you have a fabric version of [Create: Teleporters](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-teleporters) because I really want to use that mod).


This modpack was originally designed for the SSB Create server, but anyone can use if it they wish.

Main features:
- [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric) and many Create addons
- (Slightly) customized [Tectonic](https://modrinth.com/datapack/tectonic) world generation with [BWG](https://modrinth.com/mod/oh-the-biomes-weve-gone) and various structure mods
- [BetterNether](https://modrinth.com/mod/betternether) and [BetterEnd](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterend)
- [Ad Astra](https://modrinth.com/mod/ad-astra), [Spectrum](https://modrinth.com/mod/spectrum), and [Deeper and Darker](https://modrinth.com/mod/deeperdarker)
- [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-refabricated) and its many addons
- Lots of additional building block mods
- Modifications/removals for a few items to better balance things, including hiding the items in [EMI](https://modrinth.com/mod/emi) to avoid confusion
- The classic performance and QoL mods you'd expect in any modpack

<details>
<summary>Full modlist:</summary>
